# Linux/glibc, TCP-only adbd build. This intentionally omits Android-only
# framework authentication, USB FunctionFS, JDWP, and mDNS integration.

add_library(liblog STATIC
	logging/liblog/log_event_list.cpp
	logging/liblog/log_event_write.cpp
	logging/liblog/logger_name.cpp
	logging/liblog/logger_read.cpp
	logging/liblog/logger_write.cpp
	logging/liblog/properties.cpp
	logging/liblog/logprint.cpp)
target_compile_definitions(liblog PRIVATE
	LIBLOG_LOG_TAG=1006 _XOPEN_SOURCE=700 FAKE_LOG_DEVICE=1)
target_include_directories(liblog PUBLIC
	core/include
	logging/liblog/include
	core/libcutils/include
	libbase/include)

include(CMakeLists.libbase.txt)

set(libcutils_SOURCES
	core/libcutils/android_get_control_file.cpp
	core/libcutils/ashmem-host.cpp
	core/libcutils/config_utils.cpp
	core/libcutils/fs.cpp
	core/libcutils/hashmap.cpp
	core/libcutils/iosched_policy.cpp
	core/libcutils/load_file.cpp
	core/libcutils/multiuser.cpp
	core/libcutils/native_handle.cpp
	core/libcutils/properties.cpp
	core/libcutils/record_stream.cpp
	core/libcutils/socket_inaddr_any_server_unix.cpp
	core/libcutils/socket_local_client_unix.cpp
	core/libcutils/socket_local_server_unix.cpp
	core/libcutils/socket_network_client_unix.cpp
	core/libcutils/sockets_unix.cpp
	core/libcutils/sockets.cpp
	core/libcutils/str_parms.cpp
	core/libcutils/strlcpy.c
	core/libcutils/trace-host.cpp)
add_library(libcutils STATIC ${libcutils_SOURCES})
target_compile_definitions(libcutils PRIVATE _GNU_SOURCE)
target_include_directories(libcutils PRIVATE
	logging/liblog/include
	core/libutils/include)
target_include_directories(libcutils PUBLIC
	core/include
	core/libcutils/include
	libbase/include)
target_link_libraries(libcutils PUBLIC libbase liblog)

set(adbd_SOURCES
	adb/adb.cpp
	adb/adb_io.cpp
	adb/adb_listeners.cpp
	adb/adb_mdns.cpp
	adb/adb_trace.cpp
	adb/adb_unique_fd.cpp
	adb/adb_utils.cpp
	adb/apacket_reader.cpp
	adb/fdevent/fdevent.cpp
	adb/fdevent/fdevent_epoll.cpp
	adb/services.cpp
	adb/shell_service_protocol.cpp
	adb/sockets.cpp
	adb/socket_spec.cpp
	adb/sysdeps/env.cpp
	adb/sysdeps/errno.cpp
	adb/sysdeps/posix/network.cpp
	adb/sysdeps_unix.cpp
	adb/transport.cpp
	adb/transport_fd.cpp
	adb/types.cpp
	adb/daemon/file_sync_service.cpp
	adb/daemon/logging.cpp
	adb/daemon/main.cpp
	adb/daemon/services.cpp
	adb/daemon/shell_service.cpp
	adb/daemon/transport_socket_server.cpp
	linux-adbd/stubs.cpp)

add_executable(adbd ${adbd_SOURCES})
target_compile_definitions(adbd PRIVATE
	ADB_HOST=0
	ADB_LINUX_TCP_ONLY=1
	_GNU_SOURCE
	ANDROID_BASE_UNIQUE_FD_DISABLE_IMPLICIT_CONVERSION=1)
target_compile_options(adbd PRIVATE
	-pthread
	-include fmt/format.h
	-Wno-deprecated-declarations
	-Wno-unused-parameter
	-Wno-missing-field-initializers)
if(ANDROID_TOOLS_ADBD_FULLY_STATIC)
	target_link_options(adbd PRIVATE -static)
else()
	target_link_options(adbd PRIVATE -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc)
endif()

# glibc before 2.34 keeps pthread in a separate static archive.  libstdc++
# references pthread_detach/pthread_join weakly, so a normal trailing
# `-pthread` does not extract those members and std::thread::detach() becomes
# a no-op call that reports the pthread_t value as an error on AArch64.
if(ANDROID_TOOLS_ADBD_FULLY_STATIC)
	set(adbd_thread_libraries
		-Wl,--whole-archive
		pthread
		-Wl,--no-whole-archive)
else()
	set(adbd_thread_libraries Threads::Threads)
endif()
target_include_directories(adbd PRIVATE
	${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
	${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
	adb
	adb/libs/libadbd_fs/include
	core/include
	core/libcutils/include
	core/diagnose_usb/include
	libbase/include
	linux-adbd/include
	logging/liblog/include)
target_link_libraries(adbd PRIVATE
	libcutils
	libbase
	liblog
	brotlicommon
	brotlidec
	brotlienc
	lz4_static
	libzstd_static
	${adbd_thread_libraries}
	resolv
	util)
